Customer Service Associate (HIM Certified) Job at Lily Hospitals Limited




        
    

        
        Lily Hospitals Limited, established since 1986, remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON). Also, we are consistently committed to high standards, continuous improvement, service excellence, organizational citizenship, and outstanding work ethics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Associate (HIM Certified)

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and customer-focused Customer Service Associate to serve as the first point of contact for customers and clients.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for handling inquiries, resolving complaints professionally, and ensuring excellent customer experience while supporting the smooth operation of front desk and customer service activities.
	The successful candidate must possess excellent communication skills, a positive attitude, and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to customers and visitors professionally
	Respond promptly to customer inquiries through physical interaction, phone calls, and digital platforms
	Resolve complaints efficiently and escalate complex issues where necessary
	Provide accurate information regarding company products and services
	Maintain proper customer records and documentation
	Handle customer feedback and ensure customer satisfaction at all times
	Support administrative and operational activities within the department
	Maintain a professional appearance and uphold the company’s customer service standards
	Build and maintain positive relationships with customers and clients
	Perform other duties as assigned by management


Requirements


	HIM (Health Information Management) Certification is mandatory
	1–3 years of relevant customer service experience
	Minimum of HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing, Health Information Management, or related discipline
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving abilities
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office applications
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Ability to work independently and within a team environment
	Must reside in Warri, Delta State or its environs, as accommodation will not be provided


Skills and Competencies:


	Customer relationship management
	Effective communication skills
	Conflict resolution ability
	Attention to detail
	Teamwork and collaboration
	Professionalism and integrity.


Benefits


	Attractive and competitive salary package
	Professional and supportive work environment
	Career growth and advancement opportunities
	Continuous training and development
	Health and welfare benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs, school result, NYSC certificate, and other relevant credentials to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Front Desk Officer Job at Charryville Academy




        
    

        
        Charryville Academy is the place to guarantee your child’s future by giving him or her quality education. We have well equipped state of the art facilities for all round Montessori, Elementary and Secondary School education. Founded in 2016, Charryville Academy has raised the bar for Pre-school, Primary and Junior Secondary Education in Edo-State, taking into consideration the complete psychological needs of a child.
     

            
    



Using the British National Curriculum as a background, we infuse the Nigerian Curriculum so our kids can enjoy a well-rounded education. We have in place pertinent resources and facilities for making our set goals and objectives effective, efficient and successful. Starting with our comfy classrooms, Montessori didactics, teaching aids, STEM program, Coding program, Art, modern indoor and outdoor areas to our well qualified teachers who are passionate about bringing out the best in all our kids, parents can rest assured that their children are getting the best education. We also emphasize input from parents and guardians especially at home. We look forward to welcoming you and your children to Charryville Academy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Benin City, Edo

Description


	We are seeking a smart, organized, and professional Front Desk Officer to serve as the first point of contact for parents, students, staff, and visitors.
	The ideal candidate will manage front desk operations, handle inquiries, maintain records, and support the smooth administrative functioning of the school.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to parents, students, visitors, and staff courteously.
	Answer phone calls, emails, and official inquiries professionally.
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence.
	Maintain visitor records and front desk documentation.
	Provide accurate information regarding school activities, admissions, and schedules.
	Assist with administrative and clerical duties such as filing, printing, photocopying, and data entry.
	Schedule appointments and direct visitors to appropriate offices.
	Support communication between departments within the school.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and professional reception area.
	Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in any related field.
	Previous experience in a receptionist or administrative role is an added advantage.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, Email).
	Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage time effectively.


Skills & Competencies:


	Customer service skills
	Telephone etiquette
	Record keeping
	Attention to detail
	Problem-solving ability
	Teamwork and professionalism.


Salary
N75,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application letter to: [email protected] using “Front Desk Officer” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Logistics Operation Coordinator Job at Fembol Investments Limited




        
    

        
        Fembol Group is a leading provider of comprehensive shipping, freight, and forwarding solutions. We specialize in delivering reliable and cost-effective logistics services to businesses globally. Our commitment to excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction has positioned us as a key player in the logistics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Operation Coordinator

Job Location: Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

 

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Logistics Operations Coordinator is responsible for onboarding transport companies, managing transport projects in the field, and ensuring efficient tracking and return of containers. The role includes retrieving container cards, escalating delays, and escalation to the Operations/Finance teams upon confirmation of returns.


Key Responsibilities
Container Tracking & Returns


	Track return status of containers and ensure timely retrieval of container cards.
	Escalate delays or issues in container returns to relevant stakeholders.
	Maintain accurate records of container movements and returns.


Field Transport Project Management:


	Supervise and manage transport projects on the field, ensuring timely and efficient delivery.
	Monitor transport service providers and take corrective actions as needed.
	Coordinate with internal teams and clients to resolve operational issues.


Transport Company Onboarding:


	Identify, evaluate, and onboard transport companies that would accept payments post-delivery
	Ensure all transporter contracts, service agreements, and compliance requirements are properly documented.


Clearing Agent Oversight:


	Track TDO preparation and file progress with agents.
	Collaborate with agents to ensure timely gate-out and delivery completion.


Haulage Operations Monitoring:


	Confirm and align with agents for haulage job execution.
	Ensure fast and efficient loading operations and document all activities.


Port Operations Support:


	To assist and support port operations, in conjunction with the port clearing teams to align management and client delivery objectives.


Documentation:


	Escalate to the Operations/Finance teams upon confirmation of container returns for invoicing of clients.
	Ensure all related documentation is accurate, complete, and submitted on time.
	Collaborate with Finance and Operations teams to resolve discrepancies.


Reporting:


	Provide daily, weekly, and ad-hoc reports on transport projects, container returns, and onboarding status.
	Escalate operational risks, delays, or non-compliance promptly to senior management.


Payments & Collections:


	Monitor agent’s and escort’s balances; escalate and follow up as needed.
	Ensure all collections are recorded and documented for transparency.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Transport Onboarding Completion: 100% of identified transport companies onboarded on schedule.
	Container Return Timeliness: ≥ 95% of containers returned as scheduled.
	Container Card Retrieval Rate: 100% retrieval for all returned shipments.
	Operational Escalation Efficiency: 100% of delays/issues escalated promptly.
	Project Delivery Success Rate: ≥ 95% of field transport projects completed without major operational issues.


Qualifications & Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Transportation Management, Maritime Studies, or a related field.
	Relevant professional certifications in Logistics, Supply Chain, or Project Management will be an added advantage.


Experience


	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in logistics operations, haulage coordination, freight forwarding, clearing and forwarding, transportation management, or a related role.
	Experience coordinating containerized cargo movements, port operations, and transporter management.
	Proven experience working with clearing agents, transport companies, and operational stakeholders.
	Experience monitoring transport projects and resolving field operational challenges.


Technical Competencies:


	Strong understanding of container tracking, container return processes, and container card retrieval.
	Knowledge of port operations, customs clearing processes, TDO management, and haulage operations.
	Ability to onboard and manage third-party transport service providers.
	Strong documentation and record-keeping skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, and reporting tools.
	Ability to prepare and interpret operational reports and performance metrics.


Skills & Attributes:


	Excellent coordination and stakeholder management skills.
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
	High level of accountability and attention to detail.
	Strong negotiation and relationship management skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
	Effective verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong follow-up and escalation management capabilities.
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.


Additional Requirements:


	Willingness to travel frequently to ports, terminals, and clientlocations as required.
	Knowledge of Nigerian port and haulage operations is highly desirable.
	Ability to work outside regular business hours when operational demands require.
